title: Max Enchant X
description: Removes vanilla enchantment level caps to level 10.
body:
# **Max Enchant X**
![max enchant x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb8376fbba50ec006217a5267186da7e973eb29.png)

**Removes vanilla enchantment level caps and allows enchantments up to level 10.
Fully compatible with Enchanting Infuser and other mods using vanilla enchantment limits.
Works ONLY with mods and systems that support custom enchantment levels above vanilla limits.**

![Max Enchant X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc649c9936d76ba3cc659ffce10ac9689704012e_0.webp)
